mapper.select: SELECT m.mode_id, m.mode_name, m.mode_type, m.category_id, m.mode_color, m.mode_icon, m.description, m.enabled, COALESCE(h.usage_count, 0) as usage_count, COALESCE(r.robot_count, 0) as robot_count, m.order_num, m.del_flag, m.tenant_id, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time FROM sys_mode m LEFT JOIN ( SELECT mode_id, COUNT(*) as usage_count FROM sys_mode_history WHERE mode_id = #{modeId} GROUP BY mode_id ) h ON m.mode_id = h.mode_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT current_mode as mode_id, COUNT(DISTINCT robot_id) as robot_count FROM sys_robot_ext WHERE current_mode = #{modeId} AND del_flag = '0' GROUP BY current_mode ) r ON m.mode_id = r.mode_id WHERE m.mode_id = #{modeId} AND m.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into sys_mode( mode_name, mode_type, category_id, mode_color, mode_icon, description, enabled, order_num, tenant_id, create_by, create_time )values( #{modeName}, #{modeType}, #{categoryId}, #{modeColor}, #{modeIcon}, #{description}, #{enabled}, #{orderNum}, #{tenantId}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update sys_mode set del_flag = '2' where mode_id = #{modeId}

update sys_mode set del_flag = '2' where mode_id in
#{modeId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_mode_history (mode_id, operation_type, content, operator, status, tenant_id, create_time) VALUES (#{modeId}, 'auto_usage', '模式被使用', 'system', 'success',
#{tenantId} (SELECT tenant_id FROM sys_mode WHERE mode_id = #{modeId})
, sysdate())
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_mode m SET m.robot_count = ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.robot_id) FROM sys_robot_ext e WHERE e.current_mode = m.mode_id AND e.del_flag = '0' AND e.tenant_id = m.tenant_id ) WHERE m.mode_id = #{modeId} AND m.del_flag = '0'
